era.zh: 东汉毕岚186年创制，三国马钧改进；元代《农书》保存完整结构
era.en: Made by Bi Lan in 186, improved by Ma Jun, with the full structure preserved in the Yuan Nong Shu

oneLiner.zh: 让链条上的每块龙骨板同时成为传动链节和刮水活塞。
oneLiner.en: Make every pallet both a drive link and a water-scraping piston.

principle.zh: 人踩四拐曲柄带动上端链轮，龙骨板链在木槽中循环，把水沿斜槽连续刮上岸。
principle.en: Pedal cranks drive the upper sprocket while a loop of dragon-bone pallets travels through a wooden trough and continuously scrapes water uphill.

sources.quote: 又使掖庭令畢嵐……又作翻車渴烏，旋於橋西，用灑南北郊路。

translation.zh: 又命掖庭令毕岚制造翻车和渴乌，设置在桥西，用来洒洗南北郊道路。
translation.en: The palace official Bi Lan was also ordered to make a chain pump and siphon west of the bridge to water the roads of the northern and southern suburbs.

sources.quote: 居京都……乃作翻車，令童兒轉之，而灌水自覆，更入更出，其巧百倍於常。

translation.zh: 马钧在京都制造翻车，让儿童转动，水便自行倾覆、不断进出，巧效远胜普通工具。
translation.en: While in the capital, Ma Jun made a chain pump that a child could turn, causing water to pour, enter, and emerge continuously with far greater ingenuity than ordinary devices.

sources.quote: 車身用板作槽，長可二丈，闊則不等，或四寸至七寸，高約一尺。槽中架行道板一條……同行道板上下通周以龍骨板葉。其在上大軸，兩端各帶拐木四莖，置於岸上木架之間。人憑架上，踏動拐木，則龍骨板隨轉，循環行道板刮水上岸……水具中機械巧捷，惟此為最。

translation.zh: 车身以木板做成长约二丈、宽四至七寸、高约一尺的槽。槽中有行道板，龙骨板环绕其上下。岸上大轴两端各带四根拐木，人踩动拐木，龙骨板便循环刮水上岸。
translation.en: Boards form a trough about two zhang long, four to seven cun wide, and one chi high. Dragon-bone pallets loop around a guide board; four crank arms at each end of the upper shaft are pedaled so the pallets circulate and scrape water ashore.

dimensions.basis: 原文直接记载，数量以count理解

label.en: Lift of three pumps in relay

topic.zh: 毕岚发明还是马钧改进
topic.en: Bi Lan's invention or Ma Jun's improvement

detail.zh: 《后汉书》的“翻车渴乌”是否就是这种龙骨水车仍有争议；马钧究竟是发明还是改进也应保留不确定性。
detail.en: It remains uncertain whether Bi Lan's 'fanche kewu' was this exact chain pump and whether Ma Jun invented or improved it.

exhibit.zh: 约3米长的龙骨水车实物

name.en: Living examples in Jiangnan water towns

exhibit.zh: 仍可见的民间龙骨水车

hook.zh: 链条就是活塞：每块龙骨板既是传动链节又是刮水板，木槽就是汽缸，没有密封也能连续提水。
hook.en: The chain is the piston: each pallet is both drive link and scraper, the trough is the cylinder, and continuous lifting needs no seal.

demo.zh: 一键把木槽变成透明侧视图，拖动曲柄，看龙骨板链沿槽把水连续刮上去。
demo.en: Make the trough transparent in side view, drag the crank, and watch the pallet chain scrape water uphill.

echo.zh: 它通向刮板输送机、斗式提升机，也像自动扶梯的祖先。
echo.en: It anticipates scraper conveyors, bucket elevators, and even the escalator.
